scored_papers.title: Geometric structure of the relativistic quantum phase space
scored_papers.abstract: The relativistic quantum phase space (QPS) formalism extends classical phase space by incorporating both mean values and variance-covariance matrices of quantum states, thereby providing a unified setting where the uncertainty principle and relativistic covariance coexist. In this work we explore the basic geometric structure of the QPS for the signature (1,4). We construct a scalar invariant built from the mean values and the inverse variance-covariance matrix, and prove its invariance under linear canonical transformations. For quantum states that saturate the uncertainty relations, the invariant encodes two fundamental length scales: a large scale characterising maximal coordinate uncertainties and a small scale characterising minimal coordinate uncertainties.
scored_papers.reason: 波束・不確定性原理の研究にど真ん中🎯🔥 量子状態の分散共分散行列と不確定性原理を相対論的位相空間で統一！squeezed statesとも直結🚀✨
scored_papers.summary: 相対論的QPS(1,4)で分散共分散行列から不変量を構成。不確定性飽和状態の幾何構造を解析📐🌟

scored_papers.title: A Covariant Phase Space Approach to Einstein-AEther Gravity
scored_papers.abstract: Black hole thermodynamics in Lorentz-violating gravity is subtle because different excitations propagate at different speeds and hence identify different causal horizons. We revisit Einstein-AEther gravity using the covariant phase space formalism with boundaries and derive a consistent first law for stationary black holes. For a mode of propagation speed c_s, we introduce a disformal frame in which the corresponding causal horizon is a Killing horizon, so that the standard Wald-type derivation can be carried out. The associated horizon charge contains, besides the usual Komar term, an irreducible entropic AEther contribution that can be interpreted as heat due to the AEther flux across the horizon.
scored_papers.reason: Einstein-Cartan・vierbein重力と直結🎯 Lorentz破れ重力でのBH熱力学をcovariant phase space法で厳密定式化、BH第一法則を導出🔥✨
scored_papers.summary: disformal frameで各速度 cs のKilling地平線にWald型BH第一法則を導出。AEtherエントロピー寄与も解明🪐💫

scored_papers.title: Determining G with Laser Spectroscopy to 38 ppb
scored_papers.abstract: A precision measurement is proposed to determine, in a couple hours of integration time, the axion Compton frequency using a modest power (3 mW) tunable external-cavity diode laser at 2458 nm as input to drive a free-space table-top Mach-Zehnder interferometer whose sensing arm passes the expanded beam-waist (3 mm) light beam through a 1 T strong, 40 cm long dipole magnetic field. As the laser frequency is slowly modulated at 1 kHz, a small but observable modulation appears in the dark-port optical power due to resonant axion-photon conversion.
scored_papers.reason: アクシオンDM検出への直接アプローチ🎯🔬 テーブルトップ実験でアクシオンCompton振動数を38 ppb精度で測定する提案！現実的セットアップ🚀💡
scored_papers.summary: 3 mW CWレーザー＋Mach-Zehnder干渉計＋1 T磁場でアクシオン-光子共鳴変換を利用した精密測定📏⚡

scored_papers.title: Cosmological brick walls & quantum chaotic dynamics of de Sitter horizons
scored_papers.abstract: Originally proposed by 't Hooft, the brick wall model has recently reemerged as a useful framework for probing quantum aspects of horizon physics. In this paper, we apply it to asymptotically de Sitter spacetimes. We compute the normal modes of a massless scalar field in pure de Sitter space and in the Schwarzschild-de Sitter black hole, and analyze the resulting single-particle spectra using the level-spacing distribution, the spectral form factor, and Krylov complexity. In pure de Sitter, the spectrum exhibits clear long-range signatures of chaos.
scored_papers.reason: de Sitter地平線のHawking放射・量子カオスに直球🎯🌌 't Hooftのbrick wall模型をde Sitter時空に適用しKrylov complexityまで解析🔥💥
scored_papers.summary: 純dS＋Schwarzschild-dS BHの準固有モードで準位間隔・spectral form factor・Krylov complexityを解析📊✨
